9674447580.title: Add Career Page to Website
9674447580.whyItMatters: A careers page helps Google understand your business is active and growing, which can improve your search rankings.

9686155405.title: Add Staff Member to About Page
9686155405.whyItMatters: Updated staff information keeps your website fresh and relevant, which search engines favor for ranking.

9689681659.title: Plan Links for Attorney Bio Pages
9689681659.whyItMatters: Strategic internal linking between attorney pages helps search engines understand your site structure and improves rankings.

9679604813.title: Update Contact Forms on Location Pages
9679604813.whyItMatters: Consistent contact forms across location pages improve user experience, which Google considers when ranking your site.

9674388764.title: Update Attorney Bio Page Content
9674388764.whyItMatters: Well-optimized attorney bio pages help your lawyers rank individually in search results for their expertise.

9684693005.title: Adjust Review Link Distribution Settings
9684693005.whyItMatters: Proper review distribution helps balance your online reputation across locations, improving local search rankings.

9645674524.title: Check Website for Bad Backlinks
9645674524.whyItMatters: Removing harmful backlinks protects your website from Google penalties that could hurt your search rankings.

9626801043.title: Design Attorney Bio Page Layout
9626801043.whyItMatters: Professional bio page design keeps visitors engaged longer, which signals to Google that your content is valuable.

9677334123.title: Fix Mobile Logo Description Text
9677334123.whyItMatters: Correct image descriptions help search engines understand your branding and improve accessibility for better rankings.

9675357093.title: Update Contact Button on Mobile
9675357093.whyItMatters: Mobile-friendly contact buttons improve user experience, which Google prioritizes when ranking websites on mobile searches.
